description: Out-of-scope (personality-patterns, edge-no-naming): description points clearly to personality-patterns territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'personality-patterns'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I don't really know who I am. My personality shifts depending on who I'm with. I attach so deeply, so fast, that it scares people away, and then I feel abandoned. This has been my whole life — every friendship, every relationship. I'm 38 and I don't know how to be different.
